Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Continued To Aug-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Personal Representative; The Court'S Approval Of Co-Administrator Betty Williams' Resignation; And Request For Appointment Of Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Continued To Aug-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for and with Clifford Cook. Jeniffer Elgie for Betty Jean Williams.

The Parties stepped out of the courtroom to discuss the matter but were unable to come to a resolution. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 29, 2011. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on August 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Removal Of Personal Representative; The Court'S Approval Of Co-Administrator Betty Williams' Resignation; And Request For Appointment Of Successor Administrator
Off Calendar May-16-2011 Continued To Jun-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for and with Clifford Cook. Jennifer Elgie for Betty Williams (Petitioner). Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

Counsel discussed the matter and agreed to a continuance to try to work out a buy out. The Petition for Removal of Personal Representative, etc. and status of filing of the Petition for Final Distribution were continued to June 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos.
